LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_Desc: Bring a living prisoner or downed enemy to the colony heart and force flesh acceptance. A doctor consumes a fingerspike during the rite. Poor ritual quality can cause brain burn, stupor, or death.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_Started: Forced flesh acceptance has begun for {0}.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_ImplantationSta: The doctor begins implanting a fingerspike into {0}.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_ResultClean: {0} has been forced into the flesh colony without lasting damage.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_ResultBrainBurn: {0} has joined the flesh colony, but the psychic pressure burned through the brain.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_ResultStupor: {0} has joined the flesh colony and fallen into a flesh-induced stupor.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_ResultDeath: {0} died while being forced into the flesh colony.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_Interrupted: Forced flesh acceptance of {0} was interrupted.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_InvalidBrain: No valid colony brain is available.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_HumanlikeOnly: Only living humanoids can be forced into flesh acceptance.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_NotColonists: Colonists cannot be targeted by forced flesh acceptance.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_TargetStatus: Target must be a prisoner or a downed hostile pawn.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_AlreadyAccepted: This pawn is already bound to the flesh colony.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_AlreadyInProgre: This pawn is already part of an active flesh acceptance ritual.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_NoHeart: No colony heart is available for the ritual.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_NoRitualSpace: There is not enough open space near the colony heart.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_NoDoctor: No available doctor can reach the ritual position.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_NoFingerspike: No available fingerspike can reach the ritual position.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_CannotStart: The ritual could not be started.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_MissingJobDef: Forced flesh acceptance is missing job definitions.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_DevCycleOutcome: Cycles the forced outcome for the next forced flesh acceptance ritual. Current: {0}.
